tasks.name: Hourly Heartbeat
tasks.description: Keep an OpenCode backend warm and collect a short workspace summary.

command.prompt: Inspect the current workspace, summarize recent changes, and exit.
command.title: Hourly Heartbeat

tasks.name: Single Release Gate
tasks.description: One-shot execution for a release day check.

command.prompt: Run a release readiness check and summarize blockers.
command.title: Release Gate

tasks.name: Delayed Follow-up
tasks.description: Run once after a short delay.

command.prompt: Check the workspace again and report what changed after the waiting period.
command.title: Delayed Follow-up
